---
title: "hatch dates"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
caterpillar_data <- read.csv(here("data", "clean data", "caterpillar_data.csv"))

caterpillar_data <- caterpillar_data %>%
  filter(!is.na(hatch_date))

caterpillar_data$pupal_treatment <- as.factor(caterpillar_data$pupal_treatment)
caterpillar_data$hatch_date <- as.Date(caterpillar_data$hatch_date)


```

```{r}
temp_cols <- c(
  ambient = "#484A4C",
  mean    = "#F9CA0F")

ggplot(caterpillar_data, aes(x = hatch_date, y = size_01, colour = pupal_treatment)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.6) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = temp_cols) +
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "2 day", date_labels = "%b %d") +
  labs(x = "Hatch date", y = "Egg size") +
  theme_bw()

ggplot(caterpillar_data, aes(x = hatch_date, y = pupal_treatment, colour = pupal_treatment)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  geom_jitter() +
  scale_colour_manual(values = temp_cols) +
  labs(x = "hatch date", y = "pupal treatment") +
  theme_bw()



```
